parents.subject: LU-12923 contrib: Update spelling.txt to add BUILD_BUG_ON() correction

commit.subject: LU-12923 utils: Use BUILD_BUG_ON() for wirecheck.c
commit.message:
LU-12923 utils: Use BUILD_BUG_ON() for wirecheck.c

This patch replaces all CLASSERT() with user defined
BUILD_BUG_ON() for file lustre/utils/wirecheck.c

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.super@gmail.com>
Change-Id: I31eb72dd6a16f694e8d4a8d45a6161481a382927
